structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-08-14 Maricopa Home in Five Advantage – 10-Year Amortizing Second Loans Paused
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-08-14 14:57:19-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

Effective immediately, the Maricopa Home in Five Advantage program has paused reservations for the 10-year amortizing second loan option due to funding limitations.  The 30-year forgivable and 7-year forgivable loan options remain available.  An update will be sent as soon as there is any change to the status of the 10-year amortizing second. 

 

ATTACHMENTS

*	Lakeview’s Home in 5 Advantage Email Announcement

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

For inquiries, contact: 

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>        Product Dept <mailto:%20productdept@novahomeloans.com>
